briefdescription.para: MIDI-CI version identifier for UMP v1.1 devices.

simplesect.para: Universal MIDI Packet (UMP) Format and MIDI 2.0 Protocol: 7.1.8 FB Info Notification > MIDI-CI Message Version/Format

briefdescription.para: Build an Endpoint Info Notification Universal MIDI Packet.

simplesect.para: Universal MIDI Packet (UMP) Format and MIDI 2.0 Protocol: 7.1.2 Endpoint Info Notification Message

briefdescription.para: Build a Function Block Info Notification Universal MIDI Packet.

simplesect.para: Universal MIDI Packet (UMP) Format and MIDI 2.0 Protocol: 7.1.8 Function Block Info Notification

memberdef.argsstring: (struct midi_ump *ump, size_t offset, const char *src, size_t len)
memberdef.name: fill_str

briefdescription.para: Copy an ASCII string into a Universal MIDI Packet while leaving some most significant bytes untouched, such that the caller can set this prefix.

parameterdescription.para: The ump into which the string is copied
Number of bytes from the most-significant side to leave free
The length of the source string

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct ump_stream_responder_cfg *cfg, const char *string, uint32_t prefix, size_t offset)
memberdef.name: send_string

briefdescription.para: Send a string as UMP Stream, possibly splitting into multiple packets if the string length is larger than 1 UMP.

parameterdescription.para: The fixed prefix of UMP packets to send
The offset the strings starts in the packet, in bytes

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct ump_stream_responder_cfg *cfg, const struct midi_ump pkt)
memberdef.name: ump_ep_discover

simplesect.para: The number of UMP sent as reply

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct ump_stream_responder_cfg *cfg, size_t block_num, uint8_t filter)
memberdef.name: ump_fb_discover_block

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct ump_stream_responder_cfg *cfg, const struct midi_ump pkt)
memberdef.name: ump_fb_discover

simplesect.para: The number of UMP sent as reply
